_comment: Single parametric source for every vocabulary referenced by this register. The ontology is NOT a building block — it is an external SKOS vocabulary that every block dereferences by IRI. Today the canonical source is the TTL shipped with the repo and the JSON projection used by the viewer; the migration target is OGC Rainbow (https://defs.opengis.net/). When the Rainbow URI is published, set `rainbowUri` and toggle `migrated: true` — the viewer and registry will then resolve concepts there instead of locally.

title.zh: BioClima 多语种 SKOS 词汇表

description.en: Concept schemes for EBV classes, indicators, units, observed entities and policy targets, with labels and definitions in en/es/zh/ro. Every parameter, category and target referenced anywhere in the register dereferences into this vocabulary by IRI.
description.es: Esquemas de conceptos para clases de EBV, indicadores, unidades, entidades observadas y metas políticas, con labels y definiciones en en/es/zh/ro. Cada parámetro, categoría y meta referenciada en el registro se dereferencia en este vocabulario por IRI.

rainbow._note: When the vocabulary is published in OGC Rainbow, set rainbowUri to its base URI (e.g. https://defs.opengis.net/bioclima/) and set migrated: true. The viewer will then dereference concepts via Rainbow content negotiation instead of the local concepts.json projection. No code change required.

label.en: EBV classes, names and observed properties
label.es: Clases EBV, nombres y propiedades observadas
Indicadores (ParameterGroup del PCI y categorías de zonas)
